title: T-108 — UI: AdvanceGateModal (advance_gate_modal prototype) NPD-f slice of T-061
prompt:
# T-108 — AdvanceGateModal UI

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.6 + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md advance_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:261-377 (AdvanceGateModal)
Parent root: T-061

## Goal
Single Client Component AdvanceGateModal (shadcn Dialog): renders gate-transition visual (current → next), checklist summary (Progress + items), blockers list (red Alert) OR ready Alert, notes Textarea (disabled when blockers > 0), Cancel/Advance footer. Advance button disabled until all required ACs checked AND notes.trim().length > 0. Calls advanceProjectGate Server Action.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/advance-gate-modal.tsx ('use client') uses shadcn Dialog/DialogContent/DialogHeader/DialogFooter; accepts { open, onClose, project, gateInfo, items: [{id,text,required,done}] }.
2. Computes blockers = items.filter(required && !done); renders gate-transition card (current code + next code with arrow that switches to dashed when blockers > 0).
3. Notes Textarea disabled when blockers.length > 0; Advance button disabled when (blockers.length > 0 || notes.trim().length === 0); on click calls advanceProjectGate(projectId).
4. Shows success Alert after submission.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/advance-gate-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/__tests__/advance-gate-modal.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given AdvanceGateModal renders with sample data, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:261-377, then it shows the same gate-transition visual, checklist summary Progress, blockers/ready Alert and notes Textarea using shadcn Dialog+Textarea+Alert+Progress+Badge primitives.
2. Given items with required && !done (blockers > 0), when the modal renders, then the notes Textarea is disabled, a red blocker Alert lists each blocker text, and the Advance button is disabled.
3. Given blockers.length === 0 and notes.trim().length > 0, when Advance is clicked, then advanceProjectGate(projectId) is invoked exactly once and a success Alert renders.

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/advance-gate-modal.test.tsx asserting parity, blocker disabled state, advance enabled + action invocation before component exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test advance-gate-modal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not submit when blockers > 0.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not call DB from client component.
